violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.To be changed routinely.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mops noted not hung.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Wall and ceiling areas in back prep area need cleaning or replacement. Floor inside walkin cooler noted in need of repair. Floor inside walkin freezer needs cleaning.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. Quat = 200 to 400 ppm.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): Dipper well was noted not operating.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some brown-stained ceilingf tiles noted need cleaning or replacement. Some ceiling vents in need of cleaning. Three compartment sink needs recaulk to wall. Floor inside walkin cooler and walkin freezer need cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some wire-type shelving located inside walkin cooler noted in need of repair or replacement rusting.
